title: pinus yunnanensis subsp. pygmaea
intro: Pinus yunnanensis subsp. pygmaea is a subspecies of the Yunnan pine, a small, evergreen coniferous tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pinus yunnanensis subsp. pygmaea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as coughs and fever.
